headline: 今日娱乐热点：痴迷领跑，新片来袭
headlineEn: Today's Entertainment Hotspots: 'Obsession' Leads, New Films Arrive
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周有《痴迷》《火遮眼》等2部新片。热门趋势中《痴迷》居首，《西区帮派》等紧随其后。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, but 2 new films this week including 'Obsession' and 'Blazing Eyes'. Top trend 'Obsession' leads, followed by 'West Side Gangs'.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《痴迷》热度持续攀升
industryHighlights.en: This week's new film 'Obsession' continues to rise in popularity

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》等备受期待影片即将上映
industryHighlights.en: Highly anticipated films like 'Odyssey' are coming soon

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引关注
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' release date draws attention

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》预告片热度高
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' trailer gains high traction
